Name: Mosko Moto Woodsman Pants
Notes: Perfect ADV pants for motorcycling, camping, and short hikes - same pants over weeks and huge weather changes. Layer with down pants underneath in cold, vents wide open in heat. Schoeller waterproof knees/seat, stretchy everywhere.

Name: Uniqlo Airism Boxer Briefs

Name: Moletta Lionsteel Folding Black Knife
Notes: Work of art by Michele Pensato (nicknamed Molletta — Italian for clothes peg), an archaeologist who designed knives after years of needing them in the field. Made in Maniago, the knife capital of Italy, since 1969. The circular spine mechanism is the RotoBlock: one small turn locks the framelock open, converting this folder into something functionally identical to a fixed blade. CNC-milled from solid aluminum billet. Acquired at a beloved Portland Maine knife shop. Does for me what a Rolex does for some — deep pleasure in USING this perfectly shaped steel daily. Back pocket of jeans at all times. Window breaker tip kept handy while riding for emergency egress.
